name: Rice Pilaf De William C.
recipeIngredient: salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepot, melt the butter with the olive oil over medium high heat.
2. Add all the ingredients except the liquids to the saucepot.
3. Turn the heat up to high and constantly toss until rice and noodles are toasted and browned slightly, being careful not to burn.
4. Reduce heat to low. Add the white wine and chicken broth.
5. Cover and continue cooking over low heat for 20 minutes or until rice is done and liquid is absorbed.
6. Garnish with toasted pine nuts and fresh chopped parsley.
